title: Define Success Metrics
description: Choose metrics that prove a feature worked.
content:
For this feature/initiative: {{feature}}

Define how we'll know it succeeded. Propose a primary success metric tied to the user/business outcome (not just usage), supporting metrics, and a guardrail metric to catch harm. For each, give the precise definition and a target or direction. Avoid vanity metrics. Tell me what we'd conclude if the primary metric moves but the guardrail breaks.
